title.en: At this time, a genius from the other side aske...

content.en:
At this time, a genius from the other side asked a question.

"Lord of the White Capital, what if we haven't practiced this weakened version of the Supreme Technique of the Other Side?"

The Lord of the White Capital said slightly: "If you haven't practiced it, then count it according to the degree of understanding." This cliff is not an ordinary cliff, and when you approach this cliff, it can manifest your attainments of enlightenment. When the time comes, whoever understands more and who understands less will be known at a glance. "

"I see!"

Many other level geniuses suddenly realized, and there was no doubt.

Subsequently.

They began to seriously contemplate this weakened version of the supreme art of the other side.

And Ye Tian is also contemplating this weakened version of the supreme technique on the other side.

......

"The supreme technique on the other side of the mystery, although it is incomplete, but the incomplete is just right, which reduces the difficulty of cultivation many times, but the power is almost gone, even if it is practiced, it is not good for itself, and it can't even be used for battle, at most it can only be used for viewing!"

After Ye Tian realized it for a while, he had such an insight.

But this is only a test, so such a mutilated and weakened version of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore is more suitable.

Ye Tianwu has passed a lot of golden texts and black texts on the other side, and his comprehension is very high, so he can comprehend such a supreme technique on the other side, which is not very difficult, and he can definitely practice it.

Abrupt.

A certain other shore-level world spat out an immeasurable amount of blood, and the injury was not light.

This is an attempt to perform this supreme technique on the other side, but the result is a failure, causing physical damage.

This attempt process is not exempt, but fortunately, the price paid by the weakened version of the other side's supreme technique is not great, and it can be recovered after a period of cultivation.

And the other side.

Ye Tian used his other copy body to try again and again, frantically experimenting with this weakened version of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore, so as to increase his perception and understanding, and let himself practice this mutilated and weakened version of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore faster.

The years passed.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Twenty-sixth Archean time.

Rumble!!!

A formation appeared on Ye Tian's body, and this array could continuously evolve various items, but it was not powerful.

However.

When the Lord of the White Capital saw this scene, he knew that Ye Tian had practiced this mutilated weakened version of the Supreme Technique of the Other Side.

"Very good, you passed the second test!"

The Lord of the White Capital announced.

He was very surprised, Ye Tiancai had eight bone transformation realms, and he thought that the number of golden texts and black texts on the other side that Ye Tian had mastered would not be too much, so he might be able to pass the second level, but he didn't expect that he would be the first genius on the other side to pass the second level.

And the Lord of Hiiragi was also extremely shocked.

At the beginning, Ye Tian sold him more than thirty Void Dragon Crystals, and he thought that Ye Tian would give up entering Fengya Island, but it turned out that there were many more Void Dragon Crystals, so he took them out and traded them.

Now, Ye Tian is the first to break through the second level, and he can enter Fengya Island 100%!

"The Lord of Endless is too wicked!"

The Lord of Hiiragi sighed secretly.

Immediately, he worked hard to comprehend, and he had to pass the second level, even if he couldn't pass, he had to enter the top thirty-six!

Soon, sixty primeval epochs passed.

Another Shore-level genius has practiced this mutilated and weakened version of the Beyond Supreme Technique.

"Only two have passed now, and it seems that there will not be as many as thirty-six top-level geniuses who will finally practice this incompleteness and weakening of the supreme technique on the other side!"

Ye Tian guessed.

In the blink of an eye, the time came to the ninety primeval eras.

At this time, only a dozen other level geniuses passed the second level assessment.

For such a result, the Lord of the White Capital did not have any disappointment, as if it should have been so.

Finally.

A hundred primeval epochs have passed.

"The sixteen of you have directly passed the second level, and you can join Fengya Island, as for the other other side level geniuses, touch the cliff now, and let the cliff show your comprehension and attainment. The Lord of the White Capital commanded.

These other shore-level geniuses immediately touched the cliff.

Soon, their comprehension and attainments were revealed one by one.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the White Capital began to announce his candidates to join Stormtooth Island.

In the blink of an eye, the number of thirty-six other-level geniuses was announced.

"It's so dangerous, the thirty-sixth is me, and I was almost eliminated!"

The Lord of Hiiragi rejoiced.

At this time, he also felt that his deal with Ye Tian was too wise, if he didn't trade with Ye Tian, he would be eliminated at the first level, and it would be impossible for him to join Fengya Island.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the White Capital sent all the other other shore-level geniuses back to the east, but said to Ye Tian and the other other-level geniuses: "You can go back and deal with things first, because after entering Fengya Island, you won't be able to come back for a long time." It's not that you can't come back, it's that you don't want to come back when the time comes. "

"Yes!"

Thirty-six other-level geniuses answered.

Followed by.

These thirty-six other shore-level geniuses obtained the tokens given by the Lord of the White Capital one by one.

This is the Wind Tooth Order that belongs to Wind Tooth Island.

"Take the Wind Tooth Order, if the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor attacks and kills you, directly take out the Wind Tooth Order. The Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the east will not continue to attack and kill with death. "

The Lord of the White Capital said.

This is also the safety of skyrocketing Ye Tian and other other-level geniuses.

After all, they have joined Stormtooth Island, and the news has not yet spread, so they are still in danger.

Therefore, the order is to announce this news to the outside world.

Subsequently.

Thirty-six other shore-level geniuses went back with the Wind Tooth Order.

Some of the other side level geniuses had the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to guide them, while some did not.

For example, Ye Tian did not have the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to respond.

He could not have gone back, but he also pretended to return to Guheng Mountain.

At the very least, he had to deal with the affairs of Gu Heng Mountain.

After leaving Gu Heng Mountain, his other duplicate bodies will only leave two or three bodies to stay in the boundary gap of the territorial waters, and will not continue to come out and roam in the east, otherwise it will cause some unnecessary trouble.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian is back.

The first time.

The Lord of Eternal Zero inquired about the result.

"Lord of Infinity, have you joined Stormtooth Island?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked.

Then.

Ye Tian directly took out the Wind Tooth Order.

Seeing this token, the Lord of Eternal Zero knows the result.

"I thought you would fail, but I didn't expect you to succeed!" the Lord of Eternal Zero was shocked.

Eight Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses, competing with a group of Nine-Tier Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses to join the thirty-six places on Wind Tooth Island, and successfully competed, this is simply a miracle!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of Eternal Zero, and then took away the resources he left in Guheng Mountain, and gave some of the resources to his subordinates, after all, he also followed himself for a period of time, and he had to give some benefits.

After the other trivial matters were dealt with, he left from Guheng Mountain.
